meaning: n.一条面包,块,游荡v.游荡,虚度光阴
examples: He was sawing energetically at a loaf of bread.
The cost of a loaf of bread has increased five-fold.
Be quick, Gretchen! I had the silver pieces put into the smallest loaf to give you.
Cook had run a chemical company and the Sugar Loaf ski station in Maine.
Pretty slim margins for dishing out meat loaf and Jell-O (or rather, sesame-crusted tuna).
